name: Fudgy Minty Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir cocoa and baking soda in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend in half of the oil, add boiling water; stir until mixture thickens.
3. Stir in sugar, eggs, remaining oil; stir until smooth.
4. Add flour, mint flavoring, and salt; blend well together.
5. Pour batter into a lightly greased 13 x 9 inch baking pan or two 8-inch square pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 35 to 40 minutes in the large pan, or about 30-32 minutes in the small pans.
7. While the brownies are still hot, arrange the cream-filled mint patties on top.
8. Bake an additional 3 minutes until set.
9. Let cool, then cut into squares.
